alt: Himalayan Travel Services - Car and Bike Rentals
title: Travel Services
emphasis: Car Rental • Bike Rental • Chauffeur Cars
description: Conquer mountain roads on your own terms or with a local expert. We offer self-drive car rentals, adventure/cruiser motorcycles (Himalayan 450, Classic 350, XPulse), and premium chauffeur-driven SUVs for ultimate safety.

title: Premium Accommodation
description: Stay in handpicked, personally verified places. We offer cozy local homestays with authentic hospitality, luxury mountain resorts with panoramic peak views, and scenic riverside alpine camps.

alt: Adventure Activities in Uttarakhand and Himachal
title: Adventure Activities
description: Experience high-adrenaline Himalayan sports led by certified guides. Book river rafting in Rishikesh, paragliding in Bir Billing, bungee jumping, and guided mountain treks across scenic valleys.

title: Bespoke Tour Packages
emphasis: Chardham Yatras • Adventure Treks • Custom Getaways
description: Fully organized mountain itineraries designed by local experts. Book sacred pilgrimages (Chardham, Kedarnath, Badrinath, Gangotri, Yamunotri) or guided trekking packages tailored to your group size.
